header.title: LiaScript Exporter
header.subtitle: Create exports for various LMS and formats
upload.dropzone: Drop files here or click to select
formats.scorm12.title: SCORM 1.2
formats.scorm12.subtitle: Legacy Standard
formats.scorm12.description: E-learning standard for learning management systems. Widely used, but older. Suitable for legacy LMS platforms. Learn more
formats.scorm2004.title: SCORM 2004
formats.scorm2004.subtitle: Modern Standard
formats.scorm2004.description: Modern version of the SCORM standard with advanced features for learning paths and assessments. Recommended for current LMS systems. Learn more
formats.ims.title: IMS
formats.ims.subtitle: Content Package
formats.ims.description: IMS Content Packaging for exchanging learning content between different platforms. Standard for cross-platform compatibility. Learn more
formats.web.title: Web
formats.web.subtitle: Standalone
formats.web.description: Standalone HTML website for hosting on any web server. Works offline and online. Perfect for self-hosting.
formats.pdf.title: PDF
formats.pdf.subtitle: Document
formats.pdf.description: Portable Document Format for printing and archiving. Ideal for static content and offline reading. Learn more
formats.android.title: Android
formats.android.subtitle: App Package
formats.android.description: Android app package (APK) for installation on Android devices. Enables offline access and native app experience.
formats.json.title: JSON
formats.json.subtitle: Data Export
formats.json.description: Structured data format for programmatic processing and API integration. Perfect for developers and automated workflows. Learn more
formats.epub.title: EPUB
formats.epub.subtitle: E-Book
formats.epub.description: Open e-book format for e-readers and mobile devices. Supports reflowable layouts and is compatible with most e-readers. Learn more
formats.docx.title: DOCX
formats.docx.subtitle: Word Document
formats.docx.description: Microsoft Word document format for professional documents. Compatible with Word 2007+, LibreOffice Writer, and Google Docs. Learn more
formats.rdf.title: RDF
formats.rdf.subtitle: Metadata
formats.rdf.description: Resource Description Framework for structured metadata and Linked Data. For semantic web applications and metadata export. Learn more
formats.xapi.title: xAPI
formats.xapi.subtitle: Learning Analytics
formats.xapi.description: Experience API (xAPI) for Learning Analytics and detailed tracking of learning activities. Enables advanced analytics through a Learning Record Store (LRS). Learn more
settings.scorm.title: SCORM Settings
settings.scorm.useIframeHint: For better compatibility in some LMS
settings.xapi.title: xAPI Settings
settings.xapi.lrsEndpointHint: URL of the Learning Record Store (LRS) endpoint
settings.xapi.authenticationHint: Basic Auth String for LRS (e.g. "Basic base64encodedcredentials")
settings.xapi.actorHint: xAPI Actor in JSON format (default: anonymous)
settings.xapi.courseIdHint: Unique identifier for the course (default: course URL)
settings.xapi.progressThresholdHint: Required slide progress for completion (0.0-1.0, default: 0.9)
settings.ims.title: IMS Settings
settings.web.title: Web Settings
settings.pdf.title: PDF Settings
settings.pdf.marginTopHint: Top margin in pixels or with unit (e.g. "2cm")
settings.pdf.marginBottomHint: Bottom margin in pixels or with unit
settings.pdf.marginLeftHint: Left margin in pixels or with unit
settings.pdf.marginRightHint: Right margin in pixels or with unit
settings.pdf.displayHeaderFooterHint: Shows header and footer on each page
settings.pdf.headerTemplateHint: HTML template with classes: date, title, url, pageNumber, totalPages
settings.pdf.footerTemplatePlaceholder: /
settings.pdf.timeoutHint: Wait time for complete loading (15000 = 15 seconds)
settings.android.title: Android Settings
settings.epub.title: EPUB Settings
settings.epub.author: Author
settings.docx.title: DOCX Settings
settings.docx.author: Author
settings.docx.headerHint: Add a header to every page
settings.docx.footerHint: Add a footer to every page
settings.docx.pageNumberHint: Add page numbers to the footer
settings.docx.timeoutHint: Wait time for complete loading (15000 = 15 seconds)
settings.json.title: JSON Settings
settings.rdf.title: RDF Settings
settings.rdf.templateUrlHint: URL or JSON file as template (optional)
settings.noSettings: No additional settings available for this format.
submit.info:
Export jobs are queued.
Only one export is processed at a time.
submit.errorNoFile: Please upload at least one file.
submit.errorNoGitUrl: Please enter a Git repository URL.
modal.title: Export Started
modal.successMessage: Your export has been successfully added to the queue.
status.title: Export Status
status.subtitle: Track the status of your export job
status.noExportMessage: Start a new export on the home page.
status.downloadReady: Your export is ready for download!
presets.moodle3.description: Moodle is the world's most widely used open-source learning management system. This configuration uses SCORM 1.2 for maximum compatibility with Moodle 3.x. Learn more
presets.moodle4.description: Moodle is the world's most widely used open-source learning management system. This configuration uses SCORM 1.2 for maximum compatibility with Moodle 4.x. For Moodle 3.x we recommend using the iframe mode. Learn more
presets.ilias.description: XXXILIAS is a powerful open-source LMS from Germany. This configuration uses SCORM 1.2 for best compatibility with ILIAS versions. Learn more
presets.opal.description: OPAL (Online Platform for Academic Teaching and Learning) is the central LMS for Saxon universities. Optimized for SCORM 2004. Learn more
presets.generic.description: Universal SCORM 2004 configuration for any learning management systems that support the SCORM 2004 standard. Works with most modern LMS platforms.
presets.openolat.description: OpenOlat is an open-source e-learning platform from Switzerland. This configuration uses SCORM 1.2 for full functionality. Learn more
presets.openedx.description: Open edX is the open-source platform behind edX.org and is used worldwide for MOOCs. Uses SCORM 2004 via the SCORM XBlock. Learn more
